     the Fermi energy is    -0.1845 ev

!    total energy              =  -10373.61228183 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          6.4E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.15106848 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -10373.46121335 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -222361.10060725 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  112217.01947323 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4263.17455200 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  104035.78767800 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.99320532 Ry

     total magnetization       =    89.05 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    95.48 Bohr mag/cell
